name: Fresh Express Delivery Holdings Group Co., Limited
summary: Fresh Express Delivery Holdings Group Co., Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the trading of frozen food products in People's Republic of China. The company is also involved in the production and sale of convenience food products; online sale of frozen food products and food ingredients; and property holding business. It primarily serves small and medium-sized commercial customers. The company was formerly known as FU JI Food and Catering Services Holdings Limited and changed its name to Fresh Express Delivery Holdings Group Co., Limited in June 2016. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in North Point, Hong Kong.
